body:
RESOURCE PACK
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biterp


Welcome to my addon!
If you watch anime, you may be familiar with Attack on Titan. As a huge fan, I have decided to make an addon for Shingeki no Craft, a datapack created by Fanfo.

This is not official. This is just an addon for the datapack. If you love playing SNC, you should check this one out too. This is hand bite

What is Hand Bite?
Shingeki No Craft currently has no feature that allows you to bite your hand to transform. As an AOT nerd, I've decided to make this an actual feature because this is a very common action that happens throughout the seasons of the show

SHINGEKI NO CRAFT IS NEEDED IN YOUR MINECRAFT SERVER/WORLD
it is compulsory

1.21.3 How to get the item
Transform as any titan, and you should get a text that says "CLICK ON THIS TO GET AN ITEM". Press T to access the chat, hover your cursor and click on the text. This allows you to get your very first item. RIGHT CLICK with the item to bite your hand. To balance it out, you will get a slowness effect because of how painful it is. Don't worry. That slowness effect lasts for about 10 seconds.

1.21.6-1.21.8 How to get the item
Press G, the key, and get the item

Move the item to your offhand to trigger your transformation
Hold SHIFT to heal. This makes sure that you have no wounds. You can't transform by pressing F with the item

Wanna recreate the scene where Eren threatened Hange at the prison cell?
Press SHIFT after triggering your transformation

You can increase or decrease the rate of your transformation
After biting, the speed of your transformation will decrease over time.
Triggering the transformation immediately allows you to make the transformation really fast. Triggering it after about 10 seconds makes it slower
